## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, tokens, or credentials committed
- [ ] No `.env` files included (only `.env.example` allowed)
- [ ] Guard script passed locally: `node scripts/public-repo-guard.mjs`
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed — no known-vulnerable packages added
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed in logs, comments, or error messages
- [ ] External URLs and redirects are intentional and safe

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update
